composer.placeholder.generate: Describe what you want to see…
composer.placeholder.edit: Describe what to edit and which attachment to use…
composer.promptHelp: Describe the image or edit. Ctrl or Command + Enter submits the request.
composer.blockedPrompt: Add a prompt to submit the request.
composer.blockedModel: Choose a model to submit the request.
composer.blockedRequest: Fix the request settings noted below.
composer.editNeedsTarget: Edit mode needs a target image.
composer.controlsDescription: Mode, attachments, parameters, and batch generation.
composer.modeGenerateDescription: Create an image from the prompt only.
composer.modeEditDescription: Send the prompt together with attachments.
composer.paramsDescription: Size, quality, format, and service fields.
composer.batchDescription: Build a queue of multiple requests.
composer.batchAddCurrentDescription: Put the current prompt, model, parameters and files into the queue.
composer.clearAttachmentsDescription: Remove all images and the mask from the composer.
composer.editNeedsImage: Edit mode needs at least one attached image.
composer.addMaskDescription: Select a PNG mask to limit the editable area.
composer.clearMaskDescription: Keep the images but remove the PNG mask.
composer.addRequestDescription: Create an empty request with the current settings.
composer.duplicateRequestDescription: Copy the current request with all attachments.
composer.removeRequestDescription: Remove the current request from the queue.
composer.waitingForGeneration: Request accepted. Waiting for generation updates…
composer.modelPickerDescription: Search directly or use the provider rail to jump through the model list.
composer.modelSearchPlaceholder: Search by model, ID, or provider…
composer.noProviderModels: This provider has no registered models yet.
composer.compatibilityAdjustedRequest: The request was adjusted for the selected provider: unsupported modes or attachments were cleared.
composer.comfy.noLoras: No registered LoRA yet. Add one in Settings → Generation API → ComfyUI.
providerModes.openaiCompatible.imageGene: Create an image from the prompt only.
providerModes.openaiCompatible.sizeRules: OpenAI-compatible modes accept any typed width and height, but on submit each side is clamped to {min}–{max} px and snapped {snap} to a multiple of {multiple}.
providerModes.openaiCompatible.imageEdit: Send the prompt together with a target image, optional references, and an optional mask.
providerModes.comfyui.textToImage.label: Text to Image
providerModes.comfyui.textToImage.descri: Generate a new image with the ComfyUI text-to-image workflow.
providerModes.comfyui.sizeRules: ComfyUI workflows accept any typed width and height, but on submit each side is clamped to {min}–{max} px and snapped {snap} to a multiple of {multiple} so the graph receives a valid latent/image size.
providerModes.comfyui.hiresFix.label: Hires Fix
providerModes.comfyui.hiresFix.descripti: Refine and upscale one attached image through a ComfyUI Hires Fix workflow.
composer.providerModeNeedsImage: This mode needs at least one attached image.
composer.providerModeNeedsTarget: This mode needs a target image.
composer.providerModeNeedsReference: This mode needs a reference image.
